pr_text:
## Title: Fix timespec validation in time_sub to prevent NGAP interface errors

### Summary
The `time_sub` function contained a critical bug where the calculated `tv_nsec` field could violate POSIX specifications by falling outside the valid range [0, 999999999]. This occurred due to integer overflow and insufficient bounds checking when performing timespec arithmetic. Invalid nanosecond values propagated through NGAP interface timing calculations, causing procedure failures between gNB and AMF
